title: stelis zootrophionoides
intro: Stelis zootrophionoides, also known as the orchid Stelis, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. This plant is a type of orchid that is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America and is known for its medicinal properties. The medicinal properties of Stelis zootrophionoides are attributed to its flavonoids and alkaloids, which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The herbal preparations of this plant are typically used to treat various health issues, including fever, digestive problems, and respiratory infections, and are often consumed as teas, infusions, or tinctures.
